title: Worker that dedupes with replace option to update args on collision
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.SearchIndexWorker` (queue `:search`). Add a unique constraint so only one reindex per `document_id` runs within 5 minutes. Include `replace: [args: [:updated_at]]` so that when a second enqueue collides, the existing job's `args.updated_at` is overwritten with the newer timestamp. perform/1 takes `%{"document_id" => id, "updated_at" => at}` and calls `MyApp.Search.reindex(id, at)`. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/search_index_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Introduces the `replace:` option which is a less-known feature of unique constraints. Requires reading beyond the minimum example.
